description: the reference genome; one of two genomes if a mixed-species sample
denotes regions of the genome that are neither in a selection target nor in a gene
denotes regions of the genome that are in a selection target
denotes regions of the genome that are in any gene
denotes regions of the genome that are in the specific gene that defines a target region
the name of the specific defining target gene when inTargetGene is true; NA otherwise
the junction type; one of deletion, duplication, inversion, translocation
true if the two breakpoints of a junction were within 1Mb on the same chromosome
true if the two breakpoints of a junction were on different genomes of a mixed-species sample
true if the junction was validated by 3 or more reads; false means the junction had a single read (junctions with two reads are excluded)
true if any molecule that sequenced a junction was within the allowed insert size range
true if any molecule that sequenced a junction was not within the allowed insert size range
the number of breakpoints that match the key defined by columns 1 to 11
the fraction of nBkpts within genome
the fraction of nBkpts within both genomes if a mixed-species sample; otherwise equal to fracBkpts_genome
